ddls:
CREATE TABLE "participants" (
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each participant */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the participant */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the participant */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the participant */,
  "height_m" REAL /* Height of the participant in meters */,
  "weight_kg" REAL /* Weight of the participant in kilograms */,
  "medical_history" TEXT /* Medical history of the participant */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the participant was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the participant was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "researchers" (
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each researcher */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the researcher */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the researcher */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the researcher (e.g., PI, Research Assistant) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the researcher was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the researcher was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trials" (
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trial */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the participant */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher */,
  "trial_date" TEXT /* Date of the trial */,
  "trial_time" TEXT /* Time of the trial */,
  "trial_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the trial */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the trial was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the trial was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trial_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trials_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trials_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "gait_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data entry */,
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trial */,
  "walk_direction" TEXT /* Direction of walking (e.g., Up, Down) */,
  "step_time_ms" REAL /* Total step time in milliseconds */,
  "step_time_left_ms" REAL /* Step time for the left foot in milliseconds */,
  "step_time_right_ms" REAL /* Step time for the right foot in milliseconds */,
  "cadence_steps_min" REAL /* Cadence in steps per minute */,
  "step_length_left_m" REAL /* Step length for the left foot in meters */,
  "step_length_right_m" REAL /* Step length for the right foot in meters */,
  "stride_length_m" REAL /* Stride length in meters */,
  "walking_speed_m_s" REAL /* Walking speed in meters per second */,
  "froude_au" REAL /* Froude number (dimensionless) */,
  "beta_deg" REAL /* Beta angle in degrees */,
  "sda_au" REAL /* SDa (dimensionless) */,
  "sdb_au" REAL /* SDb (dimensionless) */,
  "ratio_au" REAL /* Ratio (dimensionless) */,
  "walk_ratio_mm_steps_min" REAL /* Walk ratio (millimeters per steps per minute) */,
  "duty_factor_double_stance_pct" REAL /* Double stance duty factor percentage */,
  "duty_factor_single_stance_pct" REAL /* Single stance duty factor percentage */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gait_data_trial_id FOREIGN KEY ("trial_id") REFERENCES trials ("trial_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analysis_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis result */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the corresponding data entry */,
  "analysis_type" TEXT /* Type of analysis (e.g., ratio, duty factor) */,
  "result_value" REAL /* Value of the analysis result */,
  "result_unit" TEXT /* Unit of the analysis result */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the result was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the result was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analysis_results_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES gait_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assignment */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the assignment was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the assignment was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_assignments_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_assignments_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)
